findings.title: Hardcoded database and SMTP credentials
findings.description: Database URL, username, password, SMTP host, and SMTP credential stored as static final string constants

findings.title: Full stack trace and database URL leaked in error response
findings.description: Report generation endpoint returns full Java stack trace, exception message, and database URL in error responses

findings.title: Debug endpoint exposes complete user records including passwords
findings.description: Debug endpoint returns complete user map including plaintext passwords to any authenticated user

findings.title: Password reset token and SMTP server leaked in response
findings.description: Password reset token and internal SMTP server hostname returned directly in API response

findings.title: Admin config endpoint exposes all infrastructure credentials
findings.description: Config endpoint returns database URL, SMTP host, and SMTP credential in API response
